# hooks-auth-forgot-password

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for forgotPassword

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useForgotPasswordMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useForgotPasswordMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useForgotPasswordMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
